name: NordPass
description: Monitor NordPass activity logs, admin access, and credential management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
Note: This integration requires a NordPass Enterprise plan.

1. Log in to the NordPass Admin Panel as an Owner or Admin
2. Go to Settings > Token Management
3. Generate a new token and copy it
4. Select your data center region (EU or US)
5. Paste the token below

If you don't see Token Management in your settings, you may need to upgrade to the Enterprise plan.

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Your NordPass API token (Enterprise plan required). Go to Admin Panel > Settings > Token Management to generate one.

credentialFields.label: Data Center Region
credentialFields.helpText: Select the data center where your NordPass organization is located

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies connectivity to the NordPass Activity Logs API

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Fetches recent NordPass activity logs for compliance monitoring and audit trail evidence

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews NordPass organization member activity to verify active access management
